title: VFX & Computational Intelligence
slogan: We don't just simulate — we engineer perception
description: Specializing in high-fidelity liquid simulations and AI-driven VFX for global brands and feature films.

showreel.title: Team Showreel 2025
showreel.caption: A compilation of our latest work in feature films and TVCs

team.name: ANDREY PANFILOV
team.bio: 25+ years in CG and VFX + physics and IT. Masters liquid sims & VEX tooling. Now pioneering AI integration — fine-tuning AI models, deploying on GPU clusters, building custom tools to accelerate production. Leads the team where art meets algorithm

team.name: RICHARD LIM
team.bio: A passionate FX Artist with over a decade of global experience, honed at top studios like Framestore, The Mill, and Illumination. Richard is a Houdini specialist dedicated to pushing the boundaries of simulation to bring immersive visual worlds to life.

team.name: SOPHON SEANGKAEW
team.bio: An accomplished FX Artist with 10+ years of experience at industry giants including Weta, MPC, and BluEr. Sophon combines a deep passion for breathtaking visuals with proven leadership skills, driving complex projects to excellence with precision.
